about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Meet the team behind Chill Numbers and our mission to simplify accounting
about.missionText: At Chill Numbers, we believe accounting shouldn't be complicated. Our mission is to democratize access to professional financial tools, allowing any person or small business to manage their finances with confidence and simplicity.
about.teamSubtitle: Professionals passionate about making accounting accessible to everyone
about.valueSimplicityDesc: We believe financial tools should be intuitive and easy to use for everyone.
about.valueTrustDesc: The security of your financial data is our top priority in everything we do.
about.valueCommunityDesc: We build tools with the real needs of our user community in mind.

welcomeModal.title: Welcome to Chill Numbers!
welcomeModal.subtitle: Hi {name}, your account is ready
welcomeModal.heading: Your professional accounting tool
welcomeModal.description: Manage your bank accounts, record transactions, generate automatic reports and get detailed analytics. All designed for small businesses.

welcome.title: Welcome to Chill Numbers! 🎉
welcome.description: Welcome to your professional accounting tool. In the next steps we'll show you everything you can do. No accounting knowledge required — it's designed so anyone can use it with ease.

sidebar.title: Main Navigation Menu
sidebar.description: This is your main menu. From here you access all sections: Home, Transactions, Reports, Analytics, Accounts and Employees. You can collapse it with the arrow to gain screen space. The language button lets you switch between Spanish and English.

dashboard.title: Real-Time Financial Summary
dashboard.description: These cards show your key metrics: total income, total expenses, net profit and pending transactions. Data updates automatically every time you record a transaction. At a glance you know how your business is doing.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.description: These buttons take you directly to the most frequent actions: add a transaction, generate a report, view analytics or connect your bank. They are shortcuts so you can work faster without navigating the menu.

notifications.title: Notification Center 🔔
notifications.description: Here you receive important alerts: weekly close reminders, transactions pending review, and system notifications. The red number shows how many you haven't read. Notifications also appear as floating messages in the corner of the screen.

accounts.title: Bank Account Management
accounts.description: Accounts are the foundation of your accounting. Here you can create bank accounts, cash, credit cards, loans and more. Each account has a balance that updates automatically when you record transactions linked to it.

addAccount.title: Your Accounts Summary
addAccount.description: Here you see the total balance of all your accounts, how many active accounts you have and the total registered. To create a new account, use the 'New Account' button at the top. You can also connect your real bank with Plaid to import transactions automatically.

transactions.title: Transaction Records
transactions.description: This is the most important section. Here you record all your income and expenses. Each transaction has: type (income/expense), amount, category, date and linked account. You can filter by category, type, account or date range to find any movement.

addTransaction.title: Add New Transaction
addTransaction.description: This button opens the form to record an income or expense. Fill in the type, amount, description, category and date. If you link an account, the balance updates automatically. This is the heart of your daily accounting.

txFilters.title: Filters and Search
txFilters.description: Use these filters to find specific transactions. You can search by text, filter by category, type (income/expense), bank account or date range. Results update in real time. Very useful for reviewing expenses from a specific period.

employees.title: Employee & Payroll Management
employees.description: Manage your workforce. Register employees with their personal information, position, payroll type (hourly, weekly, biweekly, monthly) and salary. The system automatically calculates the total annual payroll cost for your financial reports.

reports.title: Professional Financial Reports 📊
reports.description: Generate three types of reports: Income Statement (income vs expenses), Transaction Summary (period activity) and Weekly Close (week control). Select the period (week, month, year) before generating. You can export to Excel or PDF.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics with Charts 📈
analytics.description: Visualize your business performance with interactive charts. Compare periods, analyze annual trends, see cash flow, category breakdown and employee analysis. Ideal for making strategic decisions based on real data.

settings.title: Account Settings ⚙️
settings.description: Customize your experience: update your personal profile, company data, notification preferences, security (password change) and system preferences (language, currency, timezone). You can also manage your subscription from the Billing tab.

complete.title: You're an expert now! 🚀
complete.description: You know all the features of Chill Numbers. The basic flow is: create your accounts → record transactions daily → generate weekly reports → analyze trends. If you need help, use the help button (?) on the dashboard. Best of luck with your business!
